name: Express Mart Check Cashing
description_short: Express Mart Check Cashing offers check cashing, payday loans, and financial services at their Charlotte, NC location with extended daily hours.
description_long:
Express Mart Check Cashing operates as a financial services provider located at 8925 Nations Ford Rd, Charlotte, NC 28217. The company is listed primarily as a check-cashing service but also advertises payday loan products to consumers in the Charlotte area. Based on the website information available, the business functions as a traditional check-cashing establishment with additional lending services.

The company offers check cashing as its primary service, along with payday loans ranging from $100 to $2,500. According to their website, they provide a simple online form for fast access to funds and claim to offer same-day or rapid funding options. They position themselves as accessible for consumers who need quick cash solutions and accept walk-in customers during extended business hours.

Express Mart distinguishes itself through its 7-day-a-week availability, operating from 9AM to 8PM every day of the week without closures. This extended schedule makes the service available for evening and weekend financial needs. The company emphasizes data security on their platform and claims 24/7 customer support accessibility through email contact at support@mbvt.com.

The company has received minimal independent review activity, with only 2 reviews recorded and a 3-star rating on the listing platform. Limited review volume makes it difficult to assess consistent customer satisfaction or service quality. As with most payday and check-cashing services, consumers should carefully evaluate fees, terms, and the total cost of borrowing before using these services, particularly given the typically high APRs associated with short-term lending products.
address: 115 E Arrowood Rd Ste A, Charlotte, NC 28217

company_info.headquarters: 115 E Arrowood Rd Ste A, Charlotte, NC 28217

pros: Extended business hours: open 9AM–8PM seven days per week, including weekends
Multiple loan amounts available: offers payday loans from $100 to $2,500
Online application option: provides simple online form for loan requests
Claims same-day funding: advertises fast access to funds for qualified borrowers
24/7 customer support access: states support team available around the clock via email
Local Charlotte location: serves customers in NC 28217 zip code with physical address
Easy contact options: provides phone number (+1 704-523-4764) and email support
cons: Minimal online reviews: only 2 reviews available, limiting ability to verify service quality
Payday loan structure: likely carries high APR typical of payday lending industry
Limited transparency: website lacks specific fee, rate, and term disclosures
Potential predatory lending practices: check-cashing and payday loan combination common among high-cost lenders
No alternative product information: no mention of credit-building or lower-cost options
best_for: Consumers in Charlotte, NC needing urgent check-cashing services during evenings or weekends
Individuals seeking short-term payday loans under $2,500 with fast funding
People without traditional bank accounts needing check conversion to cash
diagnosis: Express Mart Check Cashing is best for Charlotte-area consumers needing immediate check-cashing services or short-term emergency cash loans outside standard banking hours. The primary caveat is that payday loans and check-cashing services typically carry high fees and APRs; consumers should exhaust lower-cost alternatives (credit unions, employer advances, emergency assistance programs) before using these services and should fully understand all terms and costs before borrowing.
services: Bill payment services (implied by website navigation)
